title: Nuori mylläri
writer: Usko Kemppi, Maiju Lassila, Valentin Vaala
actors: Martti Kuningas, Teija Sopanen, Artturi Laakso
plot: A young man arrives in the village. He becomes a miller and delights the girls in the village, which evokes bitterness in others. He is subject to moralistic criticism, even though he is in fact only in love with the tailor's daug...
